# Decision Log — Personal Travel Planning

---

## 2026-05-11

**Decision:** Personalization spine content saved verbatim from operator input, not generated by Claude Code.
**Rationale:** Profile and principles are Patrik's own stable preferences; Claude Code's role is to apply them, not generate them. Update protocol (Phase 3 retro only) enforced going forward.

---

## 2026-05-11 — 5-pass funnel implementation decisions

**Decision:** Execute the 5-pass funnel redesign now (not after Albania retro).
**Context:** Albania trip is May 15 — 4 days away. The redesign touches 10 files including a full workflow rewrite and new command. Risk of bugs surfacing during the trip.
**Rationale:** System is architecture-ready. Albania is the ideal stress test because it is a multi-stop trip — the exact case the redesign was built for. Waiting would defer the improvement with no upside; bugs found during Albania feed the retro anyway.
**Alternatives considered:** Defer to post-Albania retro (lower risk, but loses the multi-stop stress test and delays architecture improvement). Partial implementation (rejected — half-finished 5-pass without the branching logic would be worse than the current system).

**Decision:** Weather ceiling relaxed from 27°C to 30°C.
**Context:** Hard Constraints in CLAUDE.md said "flag/exclude destinations over 27°C." Operator confirmed 30°C is acceptable during Albania discussion.
**Rationale:** Operator preference; 27°C was overly conservative for Mediterranean and Balkan destinations in late May/June.
**Note:** Change applied in dossier-workflow.md (Halt 3); CLAUDE.md Hard Constraints section was NOT updated — should be aligned in a future session.

**Decision:** Red-team.md is a capture-only log; entries are never directly executed from it.
**Context:** Red-team.md was created to track system weaknesses. Execution happens only when a plan file (like the 5-pass funnel plan) is approved.
**Rationale:** Prevents ad-hoc execution of red-team observations outside the normal plan → scope → QC → execute pipeline. Operator explicitly confirmed this rule mid-session.
